templates.name: Adult Swim Weekday
templates.notes: Classic weekday Adult Swim. Anchor shows (Family Guy, Futurama, Bob's Burgers, American Dad) 9–11PM, original shorts + anime overnight.

templates.name: Adult Swim Weekend
templates.notes: Weekend Adult Swim. Lead with anime (Naruto, DBZ, One Piece) 9PM–1AM, then adult animation through 5AM.

templates.name: Toonami Block
templates.notes: Saturday night Toonami — action anime back to back (Dragon Ball, Naruto, One Piece, Attack on Titan). 1-hour slots, 8PM–midnight.

templates.name: Adult Swim Late Night
templates.notes: Deep late-night AS block — anime (Ghost in the Shell, Inuyasha, Cowboy Bebop) and weird original shorts (Aqua Teen, Robot Chicken).

templates.name: CN Saturday Morning
templates.notes: Weekend morning cartoons — lighter fare, shorter episodes (Dexter's Lab, Ed Edd n Eddy, Powerpuff Girls, Looney Tunes).

templates.name: CN After School
templates.notes: Weekday after-school action block — Ben 10, Teen Titans, Samurai Jack, Code Lyoko. 30-min episodes back to back.

templates.name: CN Primetime
templates.notes: Daily CN primetime — flagship series (Adventure Time, Regular Show, Steven Universe, Gravity Falls). Best episodes.

templates.name: CN Evening Transition
templates.notes: CN-to-Adult-Swim transition block. Older-skewing CN (Dragon Ball Z, Static Shock, Teen Titans) bridging to 11PM Adult Swim start.

templates.name: Nick Jr. Morning
templates.notes: Nick Jr. preschool morning — Blue's Clues, Dora the Explorer, Bluey, Doc McStuffins. Gentle, colorful, 30-min slots.

templates.name: Nicktoons Midday
templates.notes: Classic Nicktoons marathon — SpongeBob, Fairly OddParents, Danny Phantom, Rugrats, Hey Arnold!. Deep catalog rotation.

templates.name: Nick Live-Action Block
templates.notes: Weekday after-school live-action — iCarly, Drake & Josh, Victorious, Zoey 101, Kenan & Kel. Snappy 30-min episodes.

templates.name: Nick Primetime
templates.notes: Daily Nick primetime — top animated + live-action best-of. Nick movies (DCOMs-adjacent) on Friday and Saturday.

templates.name: Nick Late Night (Avatar Block)
templates.notes: Older-skewing Nick late block — Avatar: The Last Airbender, Legend of Korra, Are You Afraid of the Dark?, Invader Zim.

templates.name: Disney Junior Morning
templates.notes: Disney Junior preschool morning — Bluey, Doc McStuffins, Sofia the First. Gentle and colorful, 30-min slots.

templates.name: Disney XD Afternoon
templates.notes: Action-adventure afternoon in the Disney XD vein — Gravity Falls, DuckTales, Star Wars Rebels, Big Hero 6 series, Tron: Uprising.

templates.name: Disney Afternoon Series
templates.notes: Classic Disney Channel sitcoms and animated series — Phineas & Ferb, Amphibia, The Owl House, Jessie, Good Luck Charlie.

templates.name: DCOM Movie Night
templates.notes: Friday/Saturday Disney Channel Original Movie night — Halloweentown, High School Musical, Descendants, Camp Rock.

templates.name: Morning Movie
templates.notes: Weekend morning feel-good feature — comedies, family films, crowd-pleasers.

templates.name: Afternoon Movie
templates.notes: Single afternoon feature — light action, comedies, and accessible hits.

templates.name: Weekend Double Feature
templates.notes: Back-to-back weekend movies — pair thematically by director, franchise, genre, or decade.

templates.name: Primetime Feature
templates.notes: Nightly primetime movie — the flagship slot. Your biggest/best available film. 2-3 hour window.

templates.name: Late Night Movie
templates.notes: Friday/Saturday late night feature — thrillers, horror, cult films, and unrated picks.

templates.name: Sitcom Evenings
templates.notes: Weekday evening sitcom block — 30-min episodes back to back (The Office, Seinfeld, Friends, Parks & Rec, Brooklyn Nine-Nine).

templates.name: Crime Drama Nights
templates.notes: Weeknight crime drama lineup — procedurals, detective, true crime (NCIS, Law & Order, Criminal Minds, Mindhunter).

templates.name: Saturday Morning Block
templates.notes: Classic Saturday morning cartoon experience — Looney Tunes, Hanna-Barbera, or your best animated lineup.

templates.name: Overnight Reruns
templates.notes: Overnight encore block — replay earlier primetime content. Keeps the channel 'on air' 24/7.
